subject: Update documentation for inter-company transaction tool
body:
- Update claude.md with:
  - New dual-mode system overview
  - Inter-company module file structure
  - Three-perspective framework documentation
  - Model 1 variants table
  - Models 2-6 planned table
  - SA tax features summary

- Update docs/README.md with:
  - Dual-mode tool description
  - Inter-company models table (6 models, Model 1 implemented)
  - Inter-company specific features
  - Links to inter-company documentation
title: Update documentation for inter-company transaction tool
